# FDL SORT - AI Optical Sorting Systems

> High-end industrial B2B sorting equipment for circular economy.

## Core Products
- AI Optical Sorter: High-speed RGB sorting for PET/HDPE bottles.
- NIR Material Sorter: Hyperspectral identification of PE/PP/PET materials.
- Film AI Sorter: Flexible packaging and thin film recovery.
- Textile AI Sorter: Automatic classification by fiber and color.
- Robot Sorter: Parallel high-speed robotic picking.
- Complete Sorting Line: Turnkey MSW and commercial waste lines.

## Technical Advantages
- RealSense Sort: Real-time multi-target detection.
- PixelSense Seg: Pixel-level material segmentation.
- UniLight: Uniform controlled imaging for high stability.
